queries.question: What is the end date of the project where all the companies are involved?
queries.sql: SELECT Projects.end_date  from Construction_Companies_Projects join Projects on Construction_Companies_Projects.project_id = Projects.id join Construction_Companies on Construction_Companies_Projects.construction_company_id = Construction_Companies.id   GROUP BY Construction_Companies_Projects.project_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Construction_Companies_Projects.construction_company_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Construction_Companies)

queries.question: Give the type and start date of the project that each construction company is working on.
queries.sql: SELECT Projects.project_type, Projects.start_date  from Construction_Companies_Projects join Projects on Construction_Companies_Projects.project_id = Projects.id join Construction_Companies on Construction_Companies_Projects.construction_company_id = Construction_Companies.id   GROUP BY Construction_Companies_Projects.project_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Construction_Companies_Projects.construction_company_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Construction_Companies)

queries.question: Give the type and start date of the project that each construction company is working on.
queries.sql: select construction_companies.company_name , projects.project_type , projects.start_date from Construction_Companies_Projects join Projects on Construction_Companies_Projects.project_id = Projects.id join Construction_Companies on Construction_Companies_Projects.construction_company_id = Construction_Companies.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?company_name ?project_type ?start_date WHERE {
  ?construction_companies_projects a :Construction_Companies_Projects .
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?construction_companies_projects p:hasProjects ?projects .
  ?construction_companies a :Construction_Companies .
  ?construction_companies_projects p:hasConstruction_Companies ?construction_companies .
  ?construction_companies p:company_name ?company_name .
  ?projects p:project_type ?project_type .
  ?projects p:start_date ?start_date .
}

queries.question: Which project start dates do all construction companies have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Projects.start_date  from Construction_Companies_Projects join Projects on Construction_Companies_Projects.project_id = Projects.id join Construction_Companies on Construction_Companies_Projects.construction_company_id = Construction_Companies.id   GROUP BY Construction_Companies_Projects.project_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Construction_Companies_Projects.construction_company_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Construction_Companies)
